summary: Testing completed for light mode text readability fix and WeTransfer module. Backend APIs all pass (10/10). Frontend light mode has a CRITICAL issue on AI Assistant page where heading text is white on light background (nearly invisible). Other pages (Budget, Facturation, Transfers) work correctly in light mode.

ui_bugs.issue: CRITICAL: Heading 'Comment puis-je vous aider ?' and subtitle text are white (rgb(255,255,255)) on light gray background in light mode - nearly invisible. CSS rule .text-white is not being applied to these elements.

issues: Main heading text has very low contrast - white text on light gray background
Subtitle text also has low contrast

action_items: FIX CRITICAL: AI Assistant page heading text visibility in light mode - the CSS selector .text-white is not matching elements with additional classes like 'text-xl sm:text-2xl font-light text-white mb-2'. Consider using theme-aware classes like 'theme-text' or adding explicit dark:text-white light:text-gray-900 classes.
critical_code_review_comments: AIAssistantPageNew.jsx line 404: h1 uses 'text-white' class which should be converted to dark in light mode, but CSS specificity issue prevents this
AIAssistantPageNew.jsx line 407: p uses 'text-white/50' class with same issue
The CSS rule in index.css '.text-white { color: #1A1A1A !important; }' is not being applied - likely due to Tailwind's class generation or CSS specificity
Transfers module implementation is complete and working correctly
Budget and Facturation pages work correctly in light mode

success_rate.frontend: 85% (AI Assistant page has critical visibility issue in light mode)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Light mode CSS fix is partially working. Budget, Facturation, and Transfers pages display correctly in light mode. AI Assistant page has a critical bug where the main heading and subtitle text are white on light background (computed color is rgb(255,255,255) instead of dark). The CSS rule .text-white in index.css is not being applied to elements that have multiple Tailwind classes. Main agent needs to fix the CSS specificity issue or use theme-aware utility classes.

light_mode_budget_page.details: Text is readable, dark text on light background, colored buttons have white text

light_mode_facturation_page.details: Text is readable, table data visible, 'Nouveau' button has white text on indigo background

light_mode_ai_assistant_page.details: CRITICAL: Heading 'Comment puis-je vous aider ?' is white (rgb(255,255,255)) on light gray background - nearly invisible. CSS override not working.

transfers_page_access.details: Page loads at /admin/transfer, shows upload form and transfer history

transfers_upload_form.details: Dropzone, title input, message textarea, email input, expiration dropdown, send button all present and functional

transfers_api_mine.details: GET /api/transfers/mine returns list of transfers (empty for new user)

transfer_public_404.details: GET /transfer/invalid-id shows 'Oops! Ce transfert n'existe pas ou a été supprimé.' error page

mocked_features.note: All APIs are real implementations using Cloudinary for file storage and Brevo for email sending
